title: True 3D Glass
description: A simple resource pack that makes all glass frames 3-dimensional!
body:
True 3D Glass is a simple resource pack that transforms vanilla glass to the next level by making it 3-dimensional! Instead of simply rendering an inside blockface on the glass in the 3D Default resource pack, True 3D Glass insets the blockfaces to make the actual frame of the glass 3-dimensional. ~~Both connected and regular textures available!~~ Non-connected version with its own benefit coming soon!
![A showcase of the connected textures version of the resource pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5dfc19adb763c472b130cfcef796eda94eeece2a_0.webp)

Benefit of non-connected textures (coming soon):
![Connected textures are good for clean-looking glass, but the non-connected version has the benefit of the inside textures not being culled by surrounding full blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6168ac997326dfe152c55ffb41602db11d7d56fb_0.webp)
